description: A graphic with a New York Post masthead at the top and a black headline reading 'Illegal immigrant truck driver involved in tragic honeymoon deaths got his license in "Newsom's California"', with the phrase about California highlighted. Below is a darkened booking-style portrait of a bearded man, with a small DHS seal at the bottom.
notable_text: NEW YORK POST; Illegal immigrant truck driver involved in tragic honeymoon deaths got his license in Newsom's California
